info.title: Pulp 3 API
info.description: Fetch, Upload, Organize, and Distribute Software Packages

license.name: GNU General Public License v2.0 or later

get.description:
ViewSet for RustContent (Cargo package versions).

Provides CRUD operations for Cargo package metadata including:
- Package name and version
- Dependencies with version requirements
- Feature flags
- Checksum verification
- Yanked status

API endpoint: /pulp/api/v3/content/rust/packages/

parameters.name: X-Task-Diagnostics
parameters.description: List of profilers to use on tasks.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description:
Ordering

* `pulp_id` - Pulp id
* `-pulp_id` - Pulp id (descending)
* `pulp_created` - Pulp created
* `-pulp_created` - Pulp created (descending)
* `pulp_last_updated` - Pulp last updated
* `-pulp_last_updated` - Pulp last updated (descending)
* `pulp_type` - Pulp type
* `-pulp_type` - Pulp type (descending)
* `upstream_id` - Upstream id
* `-upstream_id` - Upstream id (descending)
* `pulp_labels` - Pulp labels
* `-pulp_labels` - Pulp labels (descending)
* `timestamp_of_interest` - Timestamp of interest
* `-timestamp_of_interest` - Timestamp of interest (descending)
* `name` - Name
* `-name` - Name (descending)
* `canonical_name` - Canonical name
* `-canonical_name` - Canonical name (descending)
* `vers` - Vers
* `-vers` - Vers (descending)
* `cksum` - Cksum
* `-cksum` - Cksum (descending)
* `features` - Features
* `-features` - Features (descending)
* `features2` - Features2
* `-features2` - Features2 (descending)
* `links` - Links
* `-links` - Links (descending)
* `rust_version` - Rust version
* `-rust_version` - Rust version (descending)
* `v` - V
* `-v` - V (descending)
* `pk` - Pk
* `-pk` - Pk (descending)

parameters.name: orphaned_for
parameters.description: Minutes Content has been orphaned for. -1 uses ORPHAN_PROTECTION_TIME.

parameters.name: prn__in
parameters.description: Multiple values may be separated by commas.

parameters.name: pulp_href__in
parameters.description: Multiple values may be separated by commas.

parameters.name: pulp_id__in
parameters.description: Multiple values may be separated by commas.

parameters.name: pulp_label_select
parameters.description: Filter labels by search string

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Filter results by using NOT, AND and OR operations on other filters

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: exclude_fields
parameters.description: A list of fields to exclude from the response.

post.description:
Create a new RustContent (Cargo package version).

This handles creation of the package metadata along with its associated
artifact (.crate file) and dependencies.

parameters.name: X-Task-Diagnostics
parameters.description: List of profilers to use on tasks.

get.description:
A ViewSet for RustDistribution.

Similar to the RustContentViewSet above, define endpoint_name,
queryset and serializer, at a minimum.

parameters.name: X-Task-Diagnostics
parameters.description: List of profilers to use on tasks.

parameters.name: base_path
parameters.description: Filter results where base_path matches value

parameters.name: base_path__contains
parameters.description: Filter results where base_path contains value

parameters.name: base_path__icontains
parameters.description: Filter results where base_path contains value

parameters.name: base_path__in
parameters.description: Filter results where base_path is in a comma-separated list of values

parameters.name: checkpoint
parameters.description: Filter results where checkpoint matches value

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter results where name matches value

parameters.name: name__contains
parameters.description: Filter results where name contains value

parameters.name: name__icontains
parameters.description: Filter results where name contains value

parameters.name: name__iexact
parameters.description: Filter results where name matches value

parameters.name: name__in
parameters.description: Filter results where name is in a comma-separated list of values

parameters.name: name__iregex
parameters.description: Filter results where name matches regex value

parameters.name: name__istartswith
parameters.description: Filter results where name starts with value

parameters.name: name__regex
parameters.description: Filter results where name matches regex value

parameters.name: name__startswith
parameters.description: Filter results where name starts with value

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: ordering

* `pulp_id` - Pulp id

* `-pulp_last_updated` - Pulp last updated (descending)

* `-pulp_type` - Pulp type (descending)
* `name` - Name
* `-name` - Name (descending)
* `pulp_labels` - Pulp labels
* `-pulp_labels` - Pulp labels (descending)
* `base_path` - Base path
* `-base_path` - Base path (descending)
* `hidden` - Hidden
* `-hidden` - Hidden (descending)
* `checkpoint` - Checkpoint
* `-checkpoint` - Checkpoint (descending)
* `pk` - Pk
* `-pk` - Pk (descending)

get.description:
Responds to GET requests for crate downloads and readmes.

Handles:
- api/v1/crates/{name}/{version}/download - redirect to .crate file
- api/v1/crates/{name}/{version}/readme - not yet implemented

parameters.name: X-Task-Diagnostics
parameters.description: List of profilers to use on tasks.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: exclude_fields
parameters.description: A list of fields to exclude from the response.

put.description:
Responds to PUT requests for unyanking crate versions.

Handles:
- api/v1/crates/{name}/{version}/unyank

parameters.name: X-Task-Diagnostics
parameters.description: List of profilers to use on tasks.

delete.description:
Responds to DELETE requests for yanking crate versions.

Handles:
- api/v1/crates/{name}/{version}/yank

parameters.name: X-Task-Diagnostics
parameters.description: List of profilers to use on tasks.

put.description:
Handle ``cargo publish`` requests.

Parses the binary body (JSON metadata + .crate tarball), validates the
distribution allows uploads and the crate doesn't already exist in the
repository, then dispatches a publish task.

parameters.description: List of profilers to use on tasks.

get.description:
Auth verification endpoint for ``cargo login``.

Cargo calls GET /me after login to verify the token is valid.
See: https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/registry-web-api.html

ContentSummaryResponse.description: Serializer for the RepositoryVersion content summary

IndexRootResponse.description: A Serializer for summary information of an index.

auth_required.description: Indicates whether this is a private registry that requires all operations to be authenticated

Patchedrust.RustDistribution.description:
A Serializer for RustDistribution.

Add any new fields if defined on RustDistribution.
Similar to the example above, in RustContentSerializer.
Additional validators can be added to the parent validators list

For example::

class Meta:
    validators = core_serializers.DistributionSerializer.Meta.validators + [
        myValidator1, myValidator2]

base_path.description: The base (relative) path component of the published url. Avoid paths that                     overlap with other distribution base paths (e.g. "foo" and "foo/bar")

hidden.description: Whether this distribution should be shown in the content app.

repository.description: The latest RepositoryVersion for this Repository will be served.

allow_uploads.description: Allow packages to be uploaded to this index.

remote.description: Remote that can be used to fetch content when using pull-through caching.

name.description: A unique name for this remote.

url.description: The URL of an external content source.

policy.description:
The policy to use when downloading content. The possible values include: 'immediate', 'on_demand', and 'streamed'. 'on_demand' is the default.

* `immediate` - When syncing, download all metadata and content now.
* `on_demand` - When syncing, download metadata, but do not download content now. Instead, download content as clients request it, and save it in Pulp to be served for future client requests.
* `streamed` - When syncing, download metadata, but do not download content now. Instead,download content as clients request it, but never save it in Pulp. This causes future requests for that same content to have to be downloaded again.

ca_cert.description: A PEM encoded CA certificate used to validate the server certificate presented by the remote server.

client_cert.description: A PEM encoded client certificate used for authentication.

client_key.description: A PEM encoded private key used for authentication.

tls_validation.description: If True, TLS peer validation must be performed.

proxy_username.description: The username to authenticte to the proxy.

proxy_password.description: The password to authenticate to the proxy. Extra leading and trailing whitespace characters are not trimmed.

username.description: The username to be used for authentication when syncing.

password.description: The password to be used for authentication when syncing. Extra leading and trailing whitespace characters are not trimmed.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts after a download failure. If not set then the default value (3) will be used.

total_timeout.description: aiohttp.ClientTimeout.total (q.v.) for download-connections. The default is null, which will cause the default from the aiohttp library to be used.

connect_timeout.description: aiohttp.ClientTimeout.connect (q.v.) for download-connections. The default is null, which will cause the default from the aiohttp library to be used.

sock_connect_timeout.description: aiohttp.ClientTimeout.sock_connect (q.v.) for download-connections. The default is null, which will cause the default from the aiohttp library to be used.

sock_read_timeout.description: aiohttp.ClientTimeout.sock_read (q.v.) for download-connections. The default is null, which will cause the default from the aiohttp library to be used.

download_concurrency.description: Total number of simultaneous connections. If not set then the default value will be used.

rate_limit.description: Limits requests per second for each concurrent downloader

Patchedrust.RustRepository.description:
A Serializer for RustRepository.

Add any new fields if defined on RustRepository.
Similar to the example above, in RustContentSerializer.
Additional validators can be added to the parent validators list

For example::

class Meta:
    validators = core_serializers.RepositorySerializer.Meta.validators
        + [myValidator1, myValidator2]

name.description: A unique name for this repository.

retain_repo_versions.description: Retain X versions of the repository. Default is null which retains all versions.

retain_checkpoints.description: Retain X checkpoint publications for the repository. Default is null which retains all checkpoints.

remote.description: An optional remote to use by default when syncing.

PolicyEnum.description:
* `immediate` - When syncing, download all metadata and content now.
* `on_demand` - When syncing, download metadata, but do not download content now. Instead, download content as clients request it, and save it in Pulp to be served for future client requests.
* `streamed` - When syncing, download metadata, but do not download content now. Instead,download content as clients request it, but never save it in Pulp. This causes future requests for that same content to have to be downloaded again.

verify_checksums.description: Will verify that the checksum of all stored files matches what saved in the database. Otherwise only the existence of the files will be checked. Enabled by default

RepositoryAddCachedContent.description: A mixin for validating unknown serializers' fields.

remote.description: A remote to use to identify content that was cached. This will override a remote set on repository.

RepositoryAddRemoveContent.description:
Base serializer for use with [pulpcore.app.models.Model][]

This ensures that all Serializers provide values for the 'pulp_href` field.

The class provides a default for the ``ref_name`` attribute in the
ModelSerializers's ``Meta`` class. This ensures that the OpenAPI definitions
of plugins are namespaced properly.

add_content_units.description: A list of content units to add to a new repository version. This content is added after remove_content_units are removed.

remove_content_units.description: A list of content units to remove from the latest repository version. You may also specify '*' as an entry to remove all content. This content is removed before add_content_units are added.

base_version.description: A repository version whose content will be used as the initial set of content for the new repository version

RepositorySyncURL.description: A mixin for validating unknown serializers' fields.

remote.description: A remote to sync from. This will override a remote set on repository.

mirror.description: If ``True``, synchronization will remove all content that is not present in the remote repository. If ``False``, sync will be additive only.

RepositoryVersionResponse.description:
Base serializer for use with [pulpcore.app.models.Model][]

This ensures that all Serializers provide values for the 'pulp_href` field.

The class provides a default for the ``ref_name`` attribute in the
ModelSerializers's ``Meta`` class. This ensures that the OpenAPI definitions
of plugins are namespaced properly.

pulp_last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last time this resource was updated. Note: for immutable resources - like content, repository versions, and publication - pulp_created and pulp_last_updated dates will be the same.

base_version.description: A repository version whose content was used as the initial set of content for this repository version

content_summary.description: Various count summaries of the content in the version and the HREF to view them.

RustDependency.description:
Serializer for RustDependency.

Represents a single dependency entry from the Cargo package index.

name.description: Dependency name as used in code (may be renamed via 'package' field)

features.description: List of feature flags to enable for this dependency

optional.description: Whether this is an optional dependency

default_features.description: Whether to enable the dependency's default features

kind.description:
Dependency type: 'normal' (runtime), 'dev' (development), or 'build' (build script)

* `normal` - Normal
* `dev` - Development
* `build` - Build

registry.description: Alternative registry URL if dependency is from a different registry

package.description: Original crate name if the dependency was renamed

RustDependencyResponse.description:
Serializer for RustDependency.

Represents a single dependency entry from the Cargo package index.

name.description: Dependency name as used in code (may be renamed via 'package' field)

features.description: List of feature flags to enable for this dependency

optional.description: Whether this is an optional dependency

default_features.description: Whether to enable the dependency's default features

kind.description:
Dependency type: 'normal' (runtime), 'dev' (development), or 'build' (build script)

* `normal` - Normal
* `dev` - Development
* `build` - Build

registry.description: Alternative registry URL if dependency is from a different registry

package.description: Original crate name if the dependency was renamed

SetLabel.description: Serializer for synchronously setting a label.

SetLabelResponse.description: Serializer for synchronously setting a label.

UnsetLabel.description: Serializer for synchronously UNsetting a label.

UnsetLabelResponse.description: Serializer for synchronously UNsetting a label.

rust.RustContent.description:
Serializer for RustContent (Cargo package version).

Represents a single version of a Rust crate as defined in the Cargo registry
index specification. Includes package metadata, dependencies, and features.

repository.description: A URI of a repository the new content unit should be associated with.

pulp_labels.description: A dictionary of arbitrary key/value pairs used to describe a specific Content instance.

artifact.description: Artifact file representing the physical content

relative_path.description: Path where the artifact is located relative to distributions base_path

dependencies.description: List of dependencies for this package version

features.description: Feature flags mapping - maps feature names to lists of features/dependencies they enable

features2.description: Extended feature syntax support (newer registry format)

links.description: Name of native library this package links to (from Cargo.toml 'links' field)

v.description: Schema version of the index entry format

rust.RustContentResponse.description:
Serializer for RustContent (Cargo package version).

Represents a single version of a Rust crate as defined in the Cargo registry
index specification. Includes package metadata, dependencies, and features.

pulp_last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last time this resource was updated. Note: for immutable resources - like content, repository versions, and publication - pulp_created and pulp_last_updated dates will be the same.

pulp_labels.description: A dictionary of arbitrary key/value pairs used to describe a specific Content instance.

artifact.description: Artifact file representing the physical content

dependencies.description: List of dependencies for this package version

features.description: Feature flags mapping - maps feature names to lists of features/dependencies they enable

features2.description: Extended feature syntax support (newer registry format)

links.description: Name of native library this package links to (from Cargo.toml 'links' field)

v.description: Schema version of the index entry format
